headline: Johnson And Johnson Innovation Hub Deal And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) has secured naming rights for the Johnson & Johnson Exchange at the new NJ Innovation Hub in New Brunswick. The company announced a major partnership focused on early stage biomedical work and entrepreneurship within New Jersey's life sciences sector. The Johnson & Johnson Exchange is intended to connect academia, founders, and investors in one of the US's most active biotechnology ecosystems. For investors watching NYSE:JNJ, this move highlights how the company...
